1927.name: Within Taelabilreth
1927.description: Piles of loose stone block your way within Taelabilreth, although there were once obvious passages in many directions, evidenced by the arches near the ceiling. A set of slick steps lead upward, and no other exit is apparent.

1926.name: Steps Within Taelabilreth
1926.description: Narrow wooden steps lead downward from the retreat, into mount Taelabilreth. Moisture collects upon the rocky surface of the surrounding walls, dripping down from above, slickening step and wall alike. A hint of fresh air drifts up from below, but no more.

npcs.name: Nightshade
npcs.description: surfaces like a shadow upon stone, solidifying briefly only to attack!

1930.name: Among the Mountains
1930.description: A narrow path upon the nearest mountainside ceases its twisting here, where the base of two meet. A passage has been blasted by some great force at this point, creating a roughly arched entryway into the depths of the mountains themselves. Slightly ahead and to the east, a narrow rushing river churns between the rising mounds of earth and stone.

w.to_zone: Tomb of Antryg - Three Shadows Mountains

1932.name: Edge of the Rocky Hills
1932.description: The hills slowly taper off into flatlands here which extend far, far off into the distance south and southeast. A huge gate of standing stones rests at the edge of the plains, to the south.

1933.name: Sevenrock Gate
1933.description: You stand at the base of a mammoth gate formed by piled stones, here at the edge of the barren plains. The gate consists of two columns which are three stones high each, and the seventh lay across the top to join the two. The rocky hills extend to the west.

1352.name: The Rocky Hills
1352.description: Vegetation thins here along a trail through the rocky hills. Northeast tower a pair of mountains, both of formidable proportions, yet the further of the two dwarves the nearer.

1353.name: The Rocky Hills
1353.description: You pause along a trail through the rocky eastern hills, near the base of twin- mountains north and northeast. Legends of treasure and the living jade are recalled as you recognize the pair as Taelabilreth the younger, and Shimaelbevat the elder. You can continue east or west through the rocky hills from this point, or descend a steep slope downward just to the south.

npcs.name: Kobold
npcs.description: This little hairy beast has vaguely canine features.

npcs.name: Malicious bnaari
npcs.description: thing's body.  Leperous arms swing ponderously as it advances, splintered claws

1354.name: The Rocky Hills
1354.description: The meandering path through the rocky hills halts here at a darkened junction at the very base of Taelabilreth, where a steep trail leads north toward its southern face. Reflected in a pool to your east among a circle of boulders is the larger Shimaelbevat. Shadows from the mounts cross here both day and night, as the skys remain oddly clear, the air crisp and sharp.

1355.name: The Rocky Hills
1355.description: At the foot of the formidable mount Taelabilreth, an unmoving, placid pool of icy water has collected among the rocks. Preternaturally still, a hissing black mist flows over its surface, dispersing among the nearby rocky hills. A thin footpath winds westward, and the hills continue to the east.

1356.name: The Rocky Hills
1356.description: You pick your way through the rocky hills, at the edge of a daunting mountain range which rises northward. To the west, at the base of the nearest mount is a glassy, still pool of liquid. The hills continue to the east, slowly descending toward plains in the southeastern distance.

1357.name: The Rocky Hills
1357.description: An occasional lone, twisted tree rises up from between the stray boulders here among the rocky hills. A chilly breeze sweeps down from the mountains to the north, and great, barren plains stretch out far to the east, and to the southeast. Beyond the hills and plains due southward can be seen a spreading forest of oaks.

1358.name: The Rocky Hills
1358.description: A winding path ventures downward here between the rocky hills, travelling east, and west. High mountain peaks are clearly visibile to the north, their tips disappearing into the clouds.

1359.name: The Rocky Hills
1359.description: A twisting path here winds northward, up into the nearby mountains, which are shrouded in a billowing black mist. The rocky hills extend to the west, and to the southeast a towering structure of chisled stone can be seen.

1360.name: Shrouded Mountain Path
1360.description: Billowing charcoal mist envelopes you along this twisted path winding its way into the mountains. The jagged face of Taelabilreth rises in the west, in contrast to the stark, empty gorge splayed open to your east. A brittle, crunch accompanies your footfalls along the path, which offers passage further up into these darkened mountains, and southward toward the rocky hills, where can be seen the outline of a towering stone gate.

1919.name: Mount Taelabilreth
1919.description: Here upon the base of Taelabilreth the rocks jut outward, most bearing multiple scars where thick chunks of jade have been pried away. This place is cold, empty, and devoid of the treasure it was long ago fabled for. A steep trail leads upward into the shadows of the surrounding peaks.

npcs.name: Malicious bnaari
npcs.description: thing's body.  Leperous arms swing ponderously as it advances, splintered claws

1920.name: Mount Taelabilreth
1920.description: Complete darkness dominates this portion of the southern face of mount Taelabilreth, where three distinct shadows cross and merge in both day and night. The feeling here is both natural and unnatural; you are surrounded by living monuments to the geometry of nature, yet they have been raped and left barren of the jade once held within. Where precisely the crossing shadows originate is difficult to determine despite multiple peaks rising all about. The trail ascending here continues northward, and another leads to the west along the edge of the mountain, toward a squarish granite building, its door the sole remaining jade among this ravaged terrain.

1921.name: Threeshadows Retreat
1921.description: Within the confines of a large mountain retreat you find several large, padded chairs covered in the skins of long-bested beasts, strewn about in a rough semi- circle. A tremendous fireplace encompasses the northern wall, an eternal fire crackling as it radiates heat. A tapestry of finely spun silk covers most of the eastern wall of the modest retreat, and a pair of crossed swords rest opposite, above a narrow hall leading deeper into the mountainside retreat.

1922.name: Threeshadows Tavern & Supplies
1922.description: A small tavern occupies the northern corner of Threeshadow's retreat, its walls ornately decorated with painted renderings from the surrounding lands to the east. Barren stretches of blood covered fields adorn one wall, and a curious image of twin suns casting beams through the nearby triple peaks adorns another.

1923.name: Threeshadows Retreat
1923.description: A narrow hall leads from the greater portion of the retreat westward, into the mountain itself. The walls are roughstone, somewhat polished by time, and burnished in places by the licking sconce fires set at elven eye level.

1924.name: Storeroom
1924.description: A modest storeroom, neatly organized and kept well cleaned. Stacked crates of travelling supplies and equipment rest here, each within an oddly glowing ward, presumably to keep thieves -- or rodents -- from pilfering the goods. A narrow doorway leads out to a hallway, south. Along one wall hang rows of simple tools, old rusty keys, and pieces of animal hides, slowly drying.

1925.name: Threeshadows Retreat
1925.description: The hall terminates here within the mountainside, at a slight decline where a simple iron grate rests in the floor. The hall and place fires of the retreat glow to the east.

1928.name: Among the Mountains
1928.description: A rocky path ventures through the mountains, just east of the predominant Taelabilreth. Shadows cross and overlap, darkening the areas, leaving it in an eternal chill. The remnants of mining encampments dot the landscape, abandoned long ago. The path offers transit to the north and to the south.

1361.name: Shrouded Mountain Path
1361.description: You tread upon a winding path among the mountains, shrouded in an oddly shimmering black mist. The way twists upward, ascending to some unseen point, and downward, where below lay the rocky hills. Small, gnarled trees line both sides of this mountain trail, caught in the shadow of the solemn peaks surrounding.

1362.name: Shrouded Mountain Path
1362.description: Sharp flashes of pale blue light erupt from a thickening mist as it drifts through the brittle branches of small, dead trees aside this twisting path of crushed bone among the mountains. Short, periodic burts of icy wind rush down from above, violently disturbing the veil of ebon mist.

1363.name: Shrouded Mountain Path
1363.description: The path begins to slope sharply upward here, ascending to a summit shrouded in fog. The moisture in the air clings to your skin and lies heavy in your lungs. The trees creak and sway in the wind, giving them the semblance of life.

1364.name: Upon the Shrouded Mountain
1364.description: The bone crunches sharply beneath your feet. A morbid thought enters your mind: How many bones did it take to pave the road, and who were the donors? The mist seems to coalesce about everthing that does not move. It mutes all sound except the snapping of the awful gravel. The way zigzags sharply to the east and west. You are getting thirsty.
